title: vicia fauriei
intro: Vicia fauriei, also known as the Korean vetch or fava bean, is a perennial legume native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Vicia fauriei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for its medicinal uses.
